# launchdarkly_flag_import_configuration (Data Source)

Provides a LaunchDarkly flag import configuration data source.

~> **Beta:** This data source wraps a beta LaunchDarkly API. Beta resources may change or be removed in future versions.

This data source allows you to retrieve information about a flag import configuration in your LaunchDarkly project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "launchdarkly_flag_import_configuration" "split_import" {
  project_key     = "example-project"
  integration_key = "split"
  integration_id  = "57c12345abcd1234ef567890"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `integration_id` (String) The unique identifier of the flag import configuration.
- `integration_key` (String) The integration key identifying the external feature management system, for example `split`.
- `project_key` (String) The key of the project the flag import configuration belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `config` (String, Sensitive) A JSON-encoded object of configuration values for the integration. Secret values may be masked by the API.
- `id` (String) The ID in the format `project_key/integration_key/integration_id`.
- `name` (String) A human-friendly name for the flag import configuration.
- `tags` (Set of String) Tags associated with the flag import configuration.
- `version` (Number) The version of the flag import configuration.
